sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n12918" key="a)/pokos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἄποκος</orth>, <sense id="n12918.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">on, without nap, An.Ox.</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4014.tlg001:2:238" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.238</biblScope> </bibl>; <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">not shorn,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
